headerMessageParagraph: PalSafari offers very unique destinations and all packages are tailored to be thrilling and memorable. We make travelling easy by providing pick up and drop off services, meals, accommodation, transportation and more. Explore the world with your lover, family and/or friends to unlock our special offers for each adventurer when your group exceed 6 people. Our flexible payment plans allow you to reserve your vacation with 20% downpayment only, split payment among fellow adventurers, or choose pay with Klarna to enjoy your vacation now and pay back in installments later.
pickUpDropOff: Pick up and drop off services from airport, train/bus station, hotel or city center.
budgetAccommodation: Accomodation, meals, transportation and clean water are provided with kind professional hosts.
silverAccommodation: Good accomodation, transportation, meals, snacks and clean water will be provided.
luxuryAccommodation: Decent guest accomodation (including a day before the tour starts and a day after the tour ends), transportation, meals, snacks and clean water will be provided.
highPriorityGuestSafety: High priority is placed on guest safety.
